chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-386 of 2024 Const. Petition No.D-412 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.1583/2024 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.1584/2024 4. For hearing of main case 15-05-2024 Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General Mr. Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General a/w SIP Jameel Ahmed on behalf of SSP Khairpur, SIP Jamshed Ahmed and ASI Nazar Ali Jatoi of PS Gambat.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Saeed Jamal Lund Advocate has filed vkalatnama on behalf of respondent No.5, respondents No.2, 3 and 4 have filed their statements. Both are taken on record. Petitioner No.1 has appeared along with her father. Learned APG submits that the case is under investigation and meanwhile interim challan has been submitted against the accused. Mr. Achar Khan Gabol holding brief for Mr. Bashir Ahmed Shar Advocate for the petitioner, in view of above, does not press these petitions. Accordingly, both the petitions are dismissed as not pressed. Office is directed to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
